scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,idx,ana,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:indexer" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspaces run build
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace packages/shared run build && npm --workspace packages/database run build && npm --workspace packages/logger run build
scripts.db:up: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (-not (Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { Write-Host 'Docker is not installed or not on PATH.' -ForegroundColor Red; Write-Host 'Install Docker Desktop and ensure `docker` works, OR run a local Postgres on port 5432.' -ForegroundColor Yellow; exit 1 } ; docker compose up -d db"
